name: Integration Cleanup
tasksCompleted: Removed pendingToolCalls and toolResponses Maps from HistoryService
Removed fixOrphans() method from HistoryService (~150 lines)
Removed old tool methods (addPendingToolCalls, commitToolResponses, abortPendingToolCalls, getPendingToolCalls, hasPendingToolCalls)
Removed inline orphan prevention code in addMessage()
Removed obsolete states (TOOLS_PENDING, TOOLS_EXECUTING) from StateManager
Updated Turn.ts to use transaction methods instead of old tool methods
Removed feature flag checks and enabled transactions by default
Ran tests to ensure no regressions
notes: Successfully completed Phase 36 - Integration Cleanup. Removed all old orphan handling code and made the transaction system the only way tool calls are handled. Key achievements: removed ~500 lines of complex orphan handling code, synthetic response generation, duplicate detection for tool responses, and complex state reconstruction. The transaction system is now the ONLY way tool calls are handled.
